name: Delta SkyMiles® Platinum American Express Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn up to 90,000 Bonus Miles after you spend $3,000 in eligible purchases on your new Card in your first 6 months of Card Membership. Welcome offers vary and you may not be eligible.

earning_rates.notes: Worldwide, including takeout and delivery in the U.S.

annual_credits.name: Resy Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $10 per month ($120/year) in statement credits at U.S. Resy restaurants.

annual_credits.name: Rideshare Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $10 per month ($120/year) on U.S. rideshare purchases with select providers.

annual_credits.name: Global Entry/TSA PreCheck
annual_credits.description: Up to $120 statement credit for Global Entry or up to $85 for TSA PreCheck every 4 years.

lounge_access.other: Complimentary upgrade list after Medallion Members and Reserve Card Members when holding an eligible ticket on Delta.

other_benefits.name: Companion Certificate
other_benefits.description: Annual companion certificate valid for a Main Cabin round-trip flight to select destinations after renewal. Taxes/fees of $22-$250 apply.

other_benefits.name: MQD Headstart
other_benefits.description: $2,500 Medallion Qualification Dollars each Medallion Qualification Year to help reach status.

other_benefits.name: MQD Boost
other_benefits.description: Earn $1 MQD for each $20 in purchases on the card.

other_benefits.name: Free Checked Bag
other_benefits.description: First checked bag free for you and up to 8 companions on Delta flights.

other_benefits.name: Priority Boarding
other_benefits.description: Zone 5 priority boarding on Delta flights.

other_benefits.name: 15% Off Award Travel
other_benefits.description: 15% off when using miles to book Award Travel on Delta flights.

other_benefits.name: Clear Discount
other_benefits.description: Discount on Clear+ membership based on SkyMiles status.

insurance.notes: Trip delay requires delay >12 hours. Includes trip cancellation/interruption coverage.

sources.notes: Current offer, earning rates, benefits, offer history, annual credits
